title: Update the vendoring of github.com/opencontainers/selinux
body:
THis should make libpod easier to build on non linux platforms.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body:

Me thinks @rhatdan was hiding in the weeds waiting to grab PR #1000.  Nice milestone all for Podman!

Oh yeah, belated LGTM.
@rhatdan There were cookies, but I ate them all :cry:
